description: Windows-native screen / application / region recorder with an NVIDIA NVENC pipeline, multi-track audio, webcam overlay, diagnostics overlays, tray notifications, crash recovery, and update checks.
notes: ExoSnap 0.4.0 is a pre-v1 preview. Settings/preset/history formats may change before 1.0.0.
Requires an NVIDIA GPU with supported NVENC and the Microsoft Visual C++ 2022 x64 runtime.
Update checking and crash reporting are opt-in/consent-gated; recordings and settings stay local.
Settings are stored under %LOCALAPPDATA%\ExoSnap and are preserved across updates and uninstall.
